privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real T8 lead screw housing bracket model (T8_housing_bracket.FCStd, 33868 bytes) sourced from the official FreeCAD-library's Mechanical Parts/Mountings/ directory. The model is a PartDesign::Body containing engineering features (Pad, Holes, Pocket, PolarPattern). Material is specified as Aluminum 6061 with density 2.70 g/cm³ (0.0027 g/mm³). Required output includes volume (mm³), surface area (mm²), bounding box dimensions (X/Y/Z in mm), center of mass coordinates (X/Y/Z in mm), and calculated mass (grams). Verification tolerances are: volume 5%, area 5%, bounding box 5%, center of mass ±2.0 mm, mass 5%. The task runs under FreeCAD 0.19.2 using headless Python API calculation via freecadcmd for ground truth generation.
